mano_cua.last_action: window resize attempt via macOS menu
mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua成功在画布上绘制了横线和竖线，窗口调整前绘制位置与鼠标位置一致。但在尝试调整浏览器窗口大小时遇到困难：Chrome窗口处于最大化状态，mano-cua花费20+步尝试退出全屏/最大化（点击绿色按钮、拖标题栏、使用macOS窗口菜单等），最终在选择macOS「移动与调整大小→右侧」时超时。未能完成窗口调整后的二次绘制验证。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Successfully drew on canvas before resize (position aligned with cursor). Failed to complete window resize due to macOS window management complexity. Could not verify post-resize drawing position.
